description: Lightweight metadata contract for indexed documentation registry entries.

path.description: Canonical repo-relative path to the human-readable markdown document.

title.description: Human-readable title used for indexing and retrieval labels.

docType.description: Document role for routing and classification.

domain.description: Primary routing domain used for discovery grouping.

status.description: Lifecycle state for active versus historical filtering.

authoritativeness.description: Authority level used for canonical source preference.

summary.description: Concise routing-oriented summary of the document's purpose.

keywords.description: Compact keyword list for exact-match discovery hints.

relatedCodePaths.description: Repo-relative code paths directly related to the indexed document.

relatedDocs.description: Repo-relative document paths that are tightly related.

relatedRecordIds.description: Stable registry recordId values for durable cross-document references.

lastReviewed.description: Latest review date in ISO format.

aiPath.description: Repo-relative path to AI companion documentation when present.

supersedes.description: Repo-relative path to an older document superseded by this entry.

supersededBy.description: Repo-relative path to the replacement document.

crossFieldRules.description: path must be a repo-relative docs markdown path ending in .md and not .ai.md.
aiPath is optional, but when present it must end in .ai.md.
supersedes and supersededBy cannot both be set.
relatedRecordIds values should resolve to existing documentation registry recordId values.
When status is superseded, supersededBy is required.
If lastReviewed is set, it must not be later than the validation date.

exampleEntry.title: Documentation Indexing Model and Goals
exampleEntry.summary: Defines indexing goals and boundaries for documentation discovery.
